description: Persisted website chat widget conversation (`chat_widget_conversations`). Returned inside `{ data }` for Staff-scoped list/get/create/update APIs (`/v3/online_presence/chat_widget_conversations`). Dates are ISO 8601 strings in JSON. `deleted_at` is omitted from normal API responses (soft delete).

session_id.description: Chat session id from the online_presence chat service.

transcript.description: Chat transcript. **New rows** store a structured JSON document (`schemaVersion` + `messages`). Older rows may contain legacy plain text only; do not rely on plain text for new integrations.

oneOf.description: Structured transcript written to MySQL when a chat session **closes** (`chat_widget_conversations.transcript` JSON column). Same visitor-safe message list as returned on session **resume** (`POST /v3/online_presence/chat/sessions` with `resume_session_id`). Staff and integrations should render from `messages` or derive plain text as needed.

items.description: Visitor-visible chat line (**user** or **assistant**). Returned in `messages` from `POST /v3/online_presence/chat/sessions` when a session is **resumed**, and stored inside the transcript document for persisted conversations. System prompts and internal tool rows are not included.

message_type.description: Optional semantic marker for assistant status lines emitted while backend tools run (e.g., "Storing your information..."). UI can use this to avoid treating the row as a normal assistant reply.

at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the server recorded the turn. May be omitted on older Redis session blobs; clients may use it for ordering or display outside the embeddable widget.

example.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

ai_receptionist_training_feedback_histor.description: Append-only AI receptionist training feedback history captured from chat history UI. Each entry stores who submitted the feedback, when it was submitted, scope (`conversation` or `message`), and optional message reference metadata for message-level feedback.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the feedback entry was created.

created_by_staff_uid.description: Staff UID that submitted the feedback.

feedback_scope.description: Feedback scope: entire conversation (`conversation`) or specific assistant message (`message`).

message_reference.description: Optional message reference details for `message` scope feedback.

snippet.description: Short first-words snippet of the referenced message.

role.description: Optional role hint from the UI message id.

messages.content: I need to book an appointment.

ai_receptionist_training_feedback_histor.feedback_text: Avoid asking for phone again once it was already provided.

message_reference.snippet: Thank you, Itzik. Could you please provide your phone number...

page_url.description: Page URL where the chat started.

client_uid.description: Optional CRM client UID linked to this conversation.

message_count.description: Number of messages in the conversation.

lead_intent.description: Resolved lead intent extracted at conversation close (e.g., "General inquiry"). When no lead data is captured, value may be "N/A".

lead_information.description: Extracted lead key/value pairs captured from the conversation (JSON object, e.g. {"Name":"John Doe","Phone":"+15551234567"}).

messages.content: Hi, I need a quote for plumbing work.
Sure. Could you share your name and phone number?

ai_receptionist_training_feedback_histor.feedback_text: Please use a friendlier tone in follow-up messages.

example.summary: Visitor asked for plumbing quote and shared contact details.
